name: coral.query
attributes_json: {"code.file.path":"crates\\coral-app\\src\\query\\manager.rs","code.module.name":"coral_app::query::manager","code.line.number":311,"thread.id":12,"thread.name":"tokio-rt-worker","level":"INFO","target":"coral_app::query::manager","operation":"execute_sql","workspace":"default","sql":"SELECT l.ip, l.service, o.vulnerability_id FROM logs.telemetry l JOIN osv.packages o ON o.package_name = 'urllib3' AND o.version = '1.26.15' WHERE l.vulnerable_package = 'urllib3==1.26.15' AND o.ecosystem = 'PyPI' LIMIT 5","status":"ok","row_count":"5","busy_ns":58322400,"idle_ns":1252375100}
